_doc: Per-project opt-in allowlist for the Auto-Pickup Worker. Each entry lists a BC bucket the worker may post draft comments on. Add a project by appending an entry; remove a project by deleting its entry. The worker re-reads this file every scan, so changes take effect within 15 minutes with no redeploy. See spec ticket #9977150294 for Phase 3 details.

_schema.name: string, human-readable project name
_schema.approved_by: string, email of the project owner who approved auto-pickup
_schema.approved_at: string, ISO-8601 date when approval was recorded
_schema.rate_limit_per_15m: integer, max LLM calls this project gets per 15-min scan window. Default 10.
